title: Enhance hero section visual design with vibrant colors and harmonious text-image styling

requirements.text: Update the hero section background image to be more vibrant and visually complete, ensuring it creates a pleasant and engaging first impression

quotes: make the first page with the image more pleasant and vibrant

acceptanceCriteria: Background image is visually vibrant and complete
Image creates an inviting, professional first impression
Visual composition feels polished and finished

requirements.text: Adjust text colors in the hero section to harmonize with the new background image, ensuring optimal readability and visual cohesion

quotes: change the colors of the text and the picture to match each one

acceptanceCriteria: Text colors complement the background image colors
Text remains highly readable against the background
Color scheme creates a cohesive, harmonious visual experience

requirements.text: Ensure all necessary information is prominently displayed in the hero section with improved visual hierarchy and completeness

quotes: all the information added is needed

acceptanceCriteria: Key business information (headline, tagline, CTA) is clearly visible
Visual hierarchy guides user attention effectively
No essential information is missing or unclear

constraints: Maintain existing hero section component structure (frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSection.tsx)
Preserve CTA button functionality (phone and WhatsApp contact)
nonGoals: Redesigning other sections beyond the hero/first page
Changing the overall site color scheme defined in index.css

required: Vibrant and complete hero background image for laundry service website with warm, inviting atmosphere and professional aesthetic (hero-vibrant.dim_1920x1080.png)
